headline:
Pioneers of Irrigation &
Landscape in Kutch
description: At Jal Agritech India Pvt Ltd, our directors bring 20+ years of experience in irrigation and landscape development. Our dedicated team of landscape architects, horticulturists, and irrigation engineers crafts outstanding outdoor environments that blend modern design with practical functionality — from hardscaped seating areas and water features to vibrant plant arrangements and complete plantation projects.
